description_long: This is a large, modern sectional sofa with a light beige fabric upholstery, designed for spacious environments. The sofa features a symmetrical L-shaped configuration with two chaise lounges on either end, providing ample seating and lounging space. The backrest is straight and continuous, supporting multiple loose back cushions and smaller accent pillows for added comfort. The armrests are low, straight, and padded, seamlessly integrated into the sofa's silhouette. The base of the sofa is close to the ground, with short, recessed legs that are barely visible, giving it a grounded and contemporary appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a uniform, soft texture throughout.
description: A large, light beige sectional sofa with two chaise lounges, low straight armrests, and multiple loose cushions, featuring a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shaped layout, all seat and back cushions, and both chaise lounges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the straight, padded armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the uniform height of the sofa's back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other chaise lounge and armrest profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six individual seat cushions and six loose back cushions, with additional smaller accent pillows; all cushions are uniform in size and arranged in a sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Low, straight, and padded armrests integrated into the sofa's ends, matching the height of the seat and featuring a minimalist, boxy profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, recessed legs, likely made of metal or wood, positioned at the corners and possibly along the base for support; legs are not prominently visible, giving a floating appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, supporting loose back cushions; no tufting or decorative features, maintaining a clean and modern look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte fabric texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
